# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_gitattributes_uses_generated_attr_macro_for_linguist_generated__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/.gitattributes', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert '[attr]generated linguist-generated=true diff=generated' in source, "Expected a generated attributes macro: '[attr]generated linguist-generated=true diff=generated'"

def test_gitattributes_uses_generated_attr_macro_for_linguist_generated__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/.gitattributes', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('(?m)^[^\\n#].*\\s+generated\\s*$', source), "Expected at least one pattern to use the 'generated' macro (line ending with 'generated'). This confirms generated files are tagged with the macro instead of repeating 'linguist-generated=true diff=generated' on each line."

def test_gitattributes_uses_generated_attr_macro_for_linguist_generated__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/.gitattributes', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'linguist-generated=true diff=generated' not in source.split('[attr]generated linguist-generated=true diff=generated', 1)[1], "After defining the '[attr]generated' macro, generated file patterns should not repeat 'linguist-generated=true diff=generated' elsewhere in .gitattributes."
